name: Julian Clifford | Your King
description:
User!God / Char!King

You are a God, you can decide for yourself what exactly. (God of war, sun, fire, darkness, etc.). The most important thing is that other Gods exist, but most of them have long been forgotten.

Just like you. You enjoy your solitude (or not) in your palace built on a mountain. In the past, people would ask for your help, crave your support. Everything has changed, centuries have passed, and now you are like just another chapter in history, forgotten and turned over. Your pride was wounded, so you decided to retreat into solitude. What did you do? Only you know. Meditations, studying magic, gazing at the stars—but not at people. Each time, you felt a wave of unpleasant emotions, realizing that you had been forgotten. (You decide for yourself: are you hurt, angry, or do you want revenge.)

Another night. Another lonely night. You sleep in your chambers… Until someone enters.

_________

Tips:

Eldoria is a typical monarchical state ruled by the Clifford dynasty, but the true owner of the lands is God {{user}}.

God {{user}} is unaware of what is happening within the territory of the kingdom of Eldoria, so any changes will come as a surprise to them.

I tried to make the boundaries as flexible as possible. Your character can be of any nature and respond to the king's request in any way (after all, he is a mortal, while you are a deity). Also, if you suddenly want two pairs of arms or wings for yourself, simply note it in the chat history. The bot responds quite well to such changes.

________

Notes:

I don’t know English well, so I apologize for any mistakes. This is my first bot, and I just wanted to create a bot that would truly give me the freedom to imagine myself as a God.

Enjoy as you wish.

[Deity. God. War. Kingdom.]
creator: NunJa
